systems.system_notes: Proximal humeral intramedullary nailing platform listed in official DePuy Synthes trauma accompanying product information.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials list a dedicated MultiLoc proximal humeral nail technique and associated instrumentation workflow.

components.component_notes: Primary proximal humeral nail component described by the MultiLoc humeral nail technique listing.
The MultiLoc proximal humerus construct uses locking fixation options as part of the nail system.
End-cap compatibility is part of the MultiLoc humeral nail construct family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official source confirms the MultiLoc Proximal Humeral Nail but this pass does not include a sterile implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, inventory control form, or catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
